## How was it verified?

<!-- Which of these did you run, and what was the result? -->

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Manual / runtime check (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Docs (`README.md` / `AGENTS.md`) updated if behavior or flags changed
